title: त्रिपुरसुन्दरी पञ्चरत्नम्
devanagariText:
॥ श्री त्रिपुरसुन्दरी पञ्चरत्नम् ॥

श्रीमद्राजराजेश्वर्यै नमः परापररूपिण्यै।
कामेश्वरकामिन्यै नमो ललितायै चिदम्बरम्॥ १॥

बालार्कबिम्बसंकाशां चतुर्बाहुसमन्विताम्।
पाशाङ्कुशधनुर्बाणधारिणीं ललितां भजे॥ २॥

श्रीचक्रराजनिलयां बिन्दुमध्यनिवासिनीम्।
षोडशीं महाविद्यां श्रीविद्यां प्रणमाम्यहम्॥ ३॥

त्रिपुरां त्रिपुरेशीं च त्रिपुरासुन्दरीं शिवाम्।
परमानन्दरूपां तां ललिताम्बां नमाम्यहम्॥ ४॥

सर्वमङ्गलमाङ्गल्यां सर्वसिद्धिप्रदायिनीम्।
सर्वसौभाग्यजनन्तीं ललिताम्बिकां नमाम्यहम्॥ ५॥

॥ इति श्री त्रिपुरसुन्दरी पञ्चरत्नम् सम्पूर्णम् ॥
benefits: Sacred Tripura Sundari Pancharatnam for devotion and spiritual growth
Invokes blessings of Tripurasundari in all forms
Traditionally recited for removal of sins and bestows spiritual merit
Ideal for Tripurasundari festivals and daily worship
description: The Tripura Sundari Pancharatnam, known in Sanskrit as त्रिपुरसुन्दरी पञ्चरत्नम्, is five gems of devotional verses in praise of Goddess Parvati. Attributed to Lalita Sahasranama Tradition, this prayer holds a special place in Hindu devotional literature. Regular recitation is believed to remove sins and bestow spiritual merit, grant divine protection and auspiciousness, and invoke blessings of Tripurasundari in all forms. It is especially recommended on Friday (Shukravar) and during Navratri and Lalita Panchami for maximum spiritual benefit. Comprising 5 verses, it can be completed in approximately 3 minutes, making it suitable for daily devotional practice. On this page, you can read the complete Tripura Sundari Pancharatnam in Devanagari Sanskrit with English transliteration, Hindi meaning (arth), and free PDF download for offline recitation.
seoDescription: Read Tripura Sundari Pancharatnam in Sanskrit with Hindi meaning. Sacred hymn for Tripurasundari devotion and blessings.
